title: Sharding Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on horizontal scaling and shard keys.

questions.question: What is the primary difference between Partitioning and Sharding in a database context?
options: Partitioning is for SQL, Sharding is for NoSQL
Partitioning happens on a single server; Sharding involves splitting data across multiple physical servers
Sharding is only for images, Partitioning is for text
